reasoning: The document demonstrates strong quality with a fidelity score of 0.9084 and perfect programmatic ratios for word count and structural elements. The identified concerns, including a missing 'ATTEST:' label and the inclusion of the source image alongside the converted text, are minor and do not impact the accessibility or factual integrity of the resolution.

concerns.description: Minor text differences beyond acceptable reformatting
concerns.analysis: The text 'ATTEST:' which appears in the source document preceding the Clerk to the Board signature block is missing from the output JSON. While the signature block for Susan O. Washburn itself is present in the table (element index 10), the specific label indicating the attestation is omitted.
concerns.location: Signature block area, immediately before the Clerk's signature, before element index 10

concerns.analysis: The entire content of the resolution is visually duplicated on the page. The document is first rendered as accessible HTML text and a signature table. Immediately following this, the entire source PDF is included as a full-page image. This results in every part of the document—the title, all 'WHEREAS' clauses, the resolution text, and the signature blocks—appearing twice in the body of the output.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The document contains a single instance of the resolution text from 'RESOLUTION SUPPORTING THE RECLASSIFICATION...' to 'CLERK TO THE BOARD'.
concerns.output_quote: The entire content of the resolution is rendered twice: once as HTML text and a table, and a second time as a full-page image immediately following the signature table.
concerns.location: Throughout the document; the duplication begins after the 'Board of Commissioners Signatures' table.
